title: Short title
doc_html:
CHAPTER 67-A. ENERGY UTILITY REPORTING TRANSPARENCY ACT§3275.1. Short title

            This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Energy Utility Reporting Transparency Act".

            Act 2025, No. 311, §1, eff. June 24, 2025.
doc_text:
CHAPTER 67-A.  ENERGY UTILITY REPORTING TRANSPARENCY ACT§3275.1. Short title
This Chapter shall be known and may be cited as the "Energy Utility Reporting
Transparency Act".
Act 2025, No. 311, §1, eff. June 24, 2025.
